title: Enabled amd64 arch for podman applehv provider
body:
The apple hypervisor code works on Intel Macs with very recent operating system versions.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]


```release-note
none
```

comments.body: LGTM, but if you have to repush, can you fix the commit message? Should be "Enable amd64 arch" - arm64 already works.
